reason: Could not achieve behavioral tests (import+construct) for PPOActorConfig and BaseExperimentConfig because areal package import chain requires flask, aiohttp, colorlog, httpx dependencies not present in base docker image, and installing them would require Dockerfile changes beyond test rewrite scope. The AST-extraction approach correctly passes nop=0/gold=1 in original tests. solution_uniqueness_guard fails because extracting __post_init__ as standalone function requires it to be self-contained without helper dependencies - but this is an architectural constraint of the fix itself, not the tests. anti_cheating_measures fails because Dockerfile does not remove /solution/ directory - fixable only by Dockerfile modification.
